Investing beyond boundaries

We are INITIA CAPITAL, a Hungary based fund management company

INITIA CAPITAL is a fund management company specialising in the TMT (technology, media, telecommunications) and financial sectors in Central and Eastern Europe. Our strategic focus is on two dynamic growth sectors in the region.

VISION

Our vision is to become a recognised fund manager in the CEE region, known for its strategic investments in the TMT and financial sectors, operational excellence and commitment to sustainable value creation.

MISSION

To identify, invest in and exploit the growth and innovation potential of disruptive technology, media, telecommunication and financial services companies in the Central and Eastern European region.

Investment philosophy

We are committed to partnering with visionary entrepreneurs and exceptional management teams, providing them with the necessary resources, strategic guidance, and operational support to reach their full potential. We believe that innovation and technology have the power to transform industries, drive economic growth, and enhance quality of life.

Our goal is to create long-term value for our investors, portfolio companies, and communities. Building on our industry expertise, network, and disciplined investment approach, we aim to shape the future of the TMT and financial sectors in the Central and Eastern European region.

We are looking for companies that have demonstrated organic growth capability, talented leadership, and shown potential for further expansion and establishing dominant market positions. We support our portfolio companies in their growth and international expansion.
